transcript.clean_text: State four saw the first uphill finish in bakines and the first Mountain Top finish of the European World Tour season it began in Santa Monica and after 164.7 kilometers pahinis would visit LA Los de gaud for the first ever time a ski station in the winter summer Sports venue in the summer right on the edge of the massive sontrol a stage with 2 600 meters of climbing and yet another late intermediate Sprint with six four and two bonus seconds it took 30 kilometers before any break would go dangers of Crosswinds all day but seven Riders got up the road yet again the king of the mountains Jonas craigo would be there but early on UAE Emirates set their stall out to try and Chase things down today pogacha was obviously in hungry mood Jonas craigo managed to take both of the classified climbs before the final one and his job was done although he didn't quite leave the Breakaway before falling out with Pascal incorn Novak and Wellens continued to ride hard for pogacha behind and with 20 kilometers to go the break began to properly break up with the intermediate Sprint approaching it still looked for a while as if the Breakaway would take the bonus seconds but it came down very very quickly Michael Matthews darting ahead Anton taking two seconds as well the run into the final climb seven kilometers long at 7.1 percent was a fast one inios grenadiers LED everybody into the bottom but it would soon be Felix cross shutner the Austrian Champion to take over and a yellow Jersey at the start of the day Magnus Court will be unable to hold on when would the first attack come well it wouldn't take too long Jonas vingego Tour de France winner last year would be the one to kick things off today pogacha naturally would go with him but they Mark each other out allowing the rest of the group to catch them again no Panic at this point though for pog and no Panic either when David Gordo attacked three and a half kilometers to go and the Frenchman looking to prove a point to his team demanding full support at the Tour de France this year the party would start around a kilometer later behind pogachar off in search vinegar trying to join him but pogacho be the only man to bridge to godu and in the final kilometer the Slovenian star able to put down the hammer Bahrain Victorious is Juno murder was faring better than vinegar behind and when it got to the final few hundred meters gudu attempted but couldn't get round at aprilga church another day in the mountains another Victory this time his first Mountain Stage ever in bahinis pogachar winning the stage and taking the yellow jersey with it was trailing behind it wasn't his best day on a bike knowing there was plenty to do before July a great performance too from Young Kevin vocula who'd finished just ahead of Jonas vingegort and 44 seconds on the line between pogachar and vinegar on the day 10 more bonus seconds would mean that pogachar would take the lead in The GC by quite the margin David godu his closest rival made a third on the day and then the rest led by the Tour de France champion from last year but as the winner of two tours the years before that that bogacha who take the yellow Jersey in bakines with four days to go a 10 second lead over David Gordo 44 from vinegar with Yates still within a minute in fourth place stage five should be won for either the sprinters or a breakaway but with these actors up on the stage you just never know most of the stage follows the River horn heading south 212.4 kilometers is the longest stage of the week as well a late intermediate Sprint followed by a climb could pose problems for the sprinters before the stage finishes in Sample tuashato at the end of the day an interesting unpredictable day ahead Then followed by the Big Mountain Stage on stage seven and the day around needs to decide things bahines isn't quite wide open but that certainly plenty to play for that apogachos turned up leads and is in control with four stages to go
